Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
~ !  ~
25
BASIC ANATOMY FOR
COSMETIC ACUPUNCTURE
Understanding anatomy is an essential part
of cosmetic acupuncture for both diagnosis and
treatment.  Dynamic  wrinkles  are  made  by
repeated  muscle  movements.  If  the  dynamic
wrinkles get worse, especially unsymmetrically,
we  can  suspect  the  problem  is  with  muscle
movements,  as  with  a  TMJ  disorder,  tics,
twitching of the muscle, bad sleep posture, or
even  a  certain  habit  or  a  certain,  prolonged
mental  state.  Without  knowledge  of  muscle
anatomy, we cannot ﬁgure out what is going on
with those problems.
Cosmetic acupuncture is a very meticulous
job dealing with less than one inch of wrinkles
and muscles. Skin thickness around the eyes is
just around 2mm. The needle targets the dermis
or muscles, depending on the conditions and
purposes.  The  practitioner  should  be  able  to
control  the  acupuncture  needle's  depth  and
location based on anatomy. A patient’s face is
very sensitive and just a tiny mistake can have a
big negative impact on the patient.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
